is_enabled.description: Whether the channel is enabled for delivery.

type.description: Notification channel type, such as slack or webhook.

context.description: Optional project, ticket, or workflow context attached to the chat turn.

harness_draft.description: Optional unsaved harness draft from the editor so the AI can reason about the current in-memory workflow text.

project_id.description: Project ID supplied to ground the chat request.

ticket_id.description: Optional ticket ID supplied to ground the chat request.

workflow_id.description: Optional workflow ID supplied to ground the chat request.

message.description: User message content for the chat turn.

provider_id.description: Optional provider ID used to run this chat session.

session_id.description: Optional existing chat session ID to resume.

source.description: Source identifier for the chat request, such as web or cli.

parameters.name: project_id

parameters.description: Optional provider ID used to filter conversations.

project_id.description: Project ID that owns the conversation workspace and transcript.

provider_id.description: Provider ID used to run this persistent project conversation.

source.description: Project conversation source and currently must be project_sidebar.

requestBody.description: Create a project conversation request body.

200.description: List project conversation transcript entries response.

answer.description: Structured answer payload for requestUserInput interrupts.

decision.description: Provider-native interrupt decision identifier such as approve_once.

200.description: Respond to a project conversation interrupt response.

post.summary: Respond to a project conversation interrupt

focus.description: Optional per-turn focus context describing the currently selected workflow, skill, ticket, or machine surface.

bound_workflow_names.description: Workflow names currently bound to the focused skill.

harness_path.description: Harness path for the focused workflow.

has_dirty_draft.description: Whether the focused workflow or skill surface currently has unsaved draft edits.

health_summary.description: Compact health or resource summary for the focused machine.

is_active.description: Whether the focused workflow is currently active.

kind.description: Focused surface kind. Supported values are workflow, skill, ticket, and machine.

machine_status.description: Machine runtime status currently in focus.

selected_area.description: UI sub-area currently in focus, such as harness, detail, or health.

selected_file_path.description: Selected bundle file path for the focused skill surface.

ticket_assigned_agent.description: Assigned agent summary for the focused ticket.

id.description: Assigned agent ID for the focused ticket.

name.description: Assigned agent name for the focused ticket.

provider.description: Assigned agent provider name for the focused ticket.

runtime_control_state.description: Assigned agent runtime control state for the focused ticket.

runtime_phase.description: Assigned agent runtime phase for the focused ticket.

ticket_attempt_count.description: Current attempt count for the focused ticket.

ticket_current_run.description: Current run summary for the focused ticket.

attempt_number.description: Attempt number for the current focused ticket run.

current_step_status.description: Current step status for the focused ticket run.

current_step_summary.description: Current step summary for the focused ticket run.

id.description: Current run ID for the focused ticket.

last_error.description: Last error observed on the focused ticket run.

status.description: Current run status for the focused ticket.

ticket_dependencies.description: Dependency summary for the focused ticket.

identifier.description: Human-readable identifier for a related dependency ticket.

relation.description: Dependency relation such as blocks or blocked_by.

status.description: Current status of the related dependency ticket.

title.description: Title of a related dependency ticket.

ticket_hook_history.description: Recent hook execution history for the focused ticket.

hook_name.description: Hook name for a recent focused ticket hook execution.

output.description: Captured output summary for a recent focused ticket hook.

status.description: Execution status for a recent focused ticket hook.

timestamp.description: Execution timestamp for a recent focused ticket hook.

ticket_identifier.description: Human-readable ticket identifier currently in focus.

ticket_pause_reason.description: Reason retries are paused for the focused ticket.

ticket_recent_activity.description: Recent ticket-scoped activity for the focused ticket.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp for a recent focused ticket event.

event_type.description: Activity event type for a recent focused ticket event.

message.description: Human-readable summary for a recent focused ticket event.

ticket_repo_scopes.description: Repo scopes and PR references for the focused ticket.

branch_name.description: Branch name associated with the focused ticket scope.

pull_request_url.description: Pull request URL associated with the focused ticket scope.

repo_id.description: Repository ID included in the focused ticket scope.

repo_name.description: Repository name included in the focused ticket scope.

ticket_retry_paused.description: Whether retries are currently paused for the focused ticket.

ticket_target_machine.description: Target machine summary for the focused ticket.

host.description: Target machine host for the focused ticket.

id.description: Target machine ID for the focused ticket.

name.description: Target machine name for the focused ticket.

message.description: User message content appended as the next project conversation turn.

202.description: Start a project conversation turn response.

content.description: Harness content to write or validate.

requestBody.description: Validate workflow harness content request body.

200.description: List the harness variable dictionary response.

advertised_endpoint.description: Direct-connect websocket endpoint advertised by the machine when execution_mode is websocket and reachability_mode is direct_connect.

agent_cli_path.description: Absolute path to the agent CLI executable on the machine.

channel_credential.description: Machine channel credential reference reserved for transport registration, kept separate from runtime agent tokens.

certificate_id.description: Opaque certificate identifier reserved for machine channel registration.

kind.description: Credential kind reserved for machine transport registration, such as none, token, or certificate.

token_id.description: Opaque token identifier reserved for machine channel registration, distinct from runtime agent tokens.

connection_mode.description: Legacy compatibility field derived from reachability_mode and execution_mode. New clients should prefer the separated fields.

daemon_status.description: Daemon registration and session metadata for websocket-capable machine transports.

current_session_id.description: Current daemon transport session identifier, when one is active.

last_registered_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp for the daemon's last successful registration heartbeat.

registered.description: Whether the machine daemon currently has an active registration with the control plane.

session_state.description: Current machine transport session state reported for the daemon connection.

detected_arch.description: Detected CPU architecture reported for the machine.

detected_os.description: Detected operating system reported for the machine.

detection_status.description: Status of machine OS and architecture detection.

env_vars.description: Environment variable entries exported when work runs on the machine.

execution_mode.description: Execution path currently used by this record: local_process or websocket. Older records may still surface as ssh_compat until they are migrated.

host.description: Hostname or address used to reach the machine.

labels.description: Labels attached to the machine for operator reference.

port.description: Transport-specific port used to connect to the machine.

reachability_mode.description: Reachability topology for the machine: local, direct_connect, or reverse_connect.

ssh_key_path.description: Path to the SSH private key used for SSH helper bootstrap, diagnostics, or emergency repair access.

ssh_user.description: SSH helper username used for bootstrap, diagnostics, or emergency repair access.

workspace_root.description: Filesystem root directory where ticket workspaces are created on the machine.

requestBody.description: Update a machine request body.
